title: Fluffy Festive Australian Banana Fritters
description: A sweet and fluffy Australian dessert featuring fried ripe bananas and a coconut cream crack, perfect for festive occasions, and friendly to those with nut allergies.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the coconut cream, eggs, and milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Gently fold in the sliced bananas.
Heat the vegetable oil in a hot pot vessel to 350 degrees.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the banana mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy.
To make the coconut cream crack, simply chill the coconut cream in the refrigerator until set, then scoop and serve on top of the fritters.
